behaviorDeltaAnchors.description: Review whether the change is limited to input coercion from concatenation to String(value).
Review whether Symbol input stringifies to Symbol(description) instead of throwing.
Review whether escaping vocabulary and special-character behavior are unchanged.
Review whether existing non-string inputs keep their prior stringification relationship.
Review whether local dogfood Evidence and graph proposals remain separate from upstream approval and graph apply authority.

requiredHumanReviewQuestions: Does the graph delta show only index.js and test/index.js changes within the selected calibration slice?
Does the behavior delta preserve escaping vocabulary and special-character behavior?
Does the Symbol assertion demonstrate the intended Symbol stringification behavior without broad behavior expansion?
Does the graph update proposal keep graph mutation review-only and avoid graph-source apply authority?
Do the remaining risks stay visible without being treated as mitigated or accepted?
Does the local dogfood stay separate from upstream maintainer approval and user acceptance?

unresolvedGraphDeltaGaps.reason: This preview defines review questions but does not record a human graph-delta review decision.
The graph update proposal requires review before apply and does not mutate graph source.
Graph-delta review binding does not prove semantic equivalence or compiler support for the second fixture.

allowedUse: Describe how the escape-html behavior-change should be reviewed as a graph delta.
Connect changed files, graph nodes, graph edges, anchors, risks, and Evidence for human review.
Prepare a later v0.3 calibration closeout decision.
Keep graph delta and graph update proposal artifacts review-only.
forbiddenUse: Do not apply graph deltas from this preview.
Do not mutate graph source from this preview.
Do not treat this preview as semantic equivalence proof.
Do not mark the second fixture as supported.
Do not generate a contract candidate from this preview.
Do not run external checks or create required checks from this preview.
Do not treat this preview as promotion approval, user acceptance, CI enforcement, branch protection, or execution authority.

recommendedNextStep.summary: Close out the v0.3 escape-html calibration preview gap set before any support implementation.
recommendedNextStep.rationale: All observed second-fixture calibration gaps now have preview artifacts, but the fixture remains not supported, not wired, not approved, and not equivalence-proven.

nonExecutionBoundary: This graph-delta review binding preview describes review metadata only. It does not apply graph deltas, mutate graph source, mark the second fixture as supported, wire it into compile-contract --dry-run, execute checks, modify files, compile a candidate, prove equivalence, prove risk mitigation, create or approve a promotion packet, create CI enforcement, create GitHub required checks, configure branch protection, grant execution authority, automate user acceptance, or retire tree-native artifacts.
